    Catalogue of known Unix-only R code patterns

    unix_patterns.Rd

    Returns a data frame with columns id, pattern, description, and severity ("critical" or "moderate"). Used internally by check_code_patterns.

    unix_patterns()

    Value

    A data frame.

    Contents
